description: An airline has changed its schedule, and a customer's flight now departs 3 hours earlier. An agent must notify the customer and handle their request.

nodes.task_description: Notify the customer of the schedule change.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent sends an email/SMS about the change.

nodes.task_description: The customer calls and says the new time does not work for them. Explain their options, such as accepting the change, moving to a different flight for free, or getting a refund.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly communicates the customer's options.

nodes.task_description: The customer chooses to move to a later flight. Process this change free of charge.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully rebooks the customer on a more suitable flight at no cost.
